title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Broadcom India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Broadcom India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Broadcom India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Broadcom India:
Broadcom India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India!
